export.comfyuiMissing: No ComfyUI installation was detected. Set COMFYUI_PATH or install ComfyUI in your home folder.
export.notInCache: {{file}} is not in the local cache yet — download it first.
export.ollamaMissing: Ollama was not found. Install it from ollama.com and try again.
export.targetsError: Export targets could not be detected

upload.emptyFolder: The selected folder contains no uploadable files.
upload.ignoreUnreadable: The folder's .gitignore or .hfignore cannot be read safely.
upload.invalidPath: The folder contains a file name that cannot be represented safely on the Hub.
upload.needWriteScope: Your session does not have write access. Sign out and sign in again to grant write permission.
upload.selectionStale: The selected folder changed. Choose it again before uploading.
upload.signInFirst: Sign in to your Hugging Face account before uploading.
upload.specialFile: The folder contains a socket, FIFO, device, or other special file and cannot be uploaded safely.
upload.tooManyFiles: The folder has too many files — the current limit is {{max}}.
